steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Each tray holds at least 50 and at most 60 cookies.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: With 4 trays, the minimum total is 4 × 50 = 200 and the maximum is 4 × 60 = 240.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Any valid answer must satisfy 200 ≤ total ≤ 240.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content: Check each choice against this range.

eliminationHtml:
• Choice A — 165: 165 < 200, below the minimum possible total. ✗
  • Choice B — 205: 200 ≤ 205 ≤ 240, achievable (e.g., three trays of 50 and one of 55). ✓
  • Choice C — 245: 245 > 240, above the maximum possible total. ✗
  • Choice D — 285: 285 > 240, well above the maximum possible total. ✗
B is correct.
